---
title: "Further Exploratory Analyses"
author: "Sam Yu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(psych)
library(broom)
library(ggplot2)

dat_clean <- readRDS("../data/dat_clean.rds")

# Define item sets
hope_items_all <- paste0("hope_", 1:7)
action_items <- paste0("action_intentions_", 1:15)

# Create intention composite
dat_clean <- dat_clean %>%
  mutate(
    intention_composite = rowMeans(
      select(., all_of(action_items)),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  )

# Prepare hope items for EFA
hope_items <- dat_clean %>%
  select(all_of(hope_items_all))

# Three-factor EFA based on exploratory RQ1
efa3 <- fa(
  hope_items,
  nfactors = 3,
  rotate = "oblimin",
  fm = "ml",
  scores = "regression"
)

# Add factor scores to dataset
hope_factor_scores <- as.data.frame(efa3$scores)

dat_clean <- dat_clean %>%
  bind_cols(hope_factor_scores) %>%
  rename(
    Passive_Hope = ML1,
    Outcome_Hope = ML2,
    Action_Hope = ML3
  )

```
